modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about scholarships for Arts & Sciences students

full_description_text:  
Hey there! I'm trying to find out what scholarships are available for students in the College of Arts & Sciences. I’ve been looking around but can’t seem to find a clear list or any details. It would be super helpful to know what options I have, especially since I’m really interested in funding my studies!
